---
title: "ደ/ብርሃን ቅ/ሥላሴ ዳላስ ቴክሳስ"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    fig-width: 10
    fig-asp: 0.3
    # expandable: false
brand:
  light: brand/light.yml
  dark: brand/dark.yml
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{=html}
<head>
      <style>
        nav.navbar.navbar-expand-md.slim {
          display: none;
        }
      </style>
    </head>
```


```{=html}
<!-- <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap/5.3.0/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet"> -->
<link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

.info-btn {
  /* background: none;  <-- REMOVE OR COMMENT OUT THIS LINE */
 /* background-color: #ffffff;  Add this line to make the outer circle white */
  border: none;
  /*color: #6c757d;  This is the color of the 'i' icon and its inner circle */
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  padding: 0.5rem; /* This padding creates the size of the white circle */
  border-radius: 40%;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: fixed;
  top: 15px;
  right: 20px;
  z-index: 1050;
  
  background-color: #7e8f9e;
  border: none;
  color: #292a33;
}

.info-btn:hover {
    background-color: #e9ecef;
    color: #495057;
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.info-btn .fas { /* Target the Font Awesome icon directly */
  /* vertical-align: middle; */ /* Try this first */
  /* If 'middle' isn't enough, you might need a slight adjustment */
  vertical-align: -3px;  /* Example: push down by 2 pixels */
}
.modal-header {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
}

.modal-title {
    color: #2c3e50;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.section-title {
    color: #495057;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.citation-text {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    border-left: 4px solid #007bff;
    font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}
</style>

<!-- Info Button -->
<button id="infoBtn" class="info-btn" type="button" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#infoModal" title="About This Dashboard">
    <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i>
</button>

<!-- Info Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="infoModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="infoModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h5 class="modal-title" id="infoModalLabel">
                    <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
                    About This Dashboard
                </h5>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-calendar-alt me-2"></i>Data Period
                </div>
                <p class="mb-3">Weekly update</p>
                
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-database me-2"></i>Data Source
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2">Data originally from:</p>
                <p class="mb-2">
                    The core of its functionality relies on the Google YouTube Data API and Google YouTube Analytics API.
                    <br>
                    <a href="https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>
                        https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3
                    </a>
                </p>
                <p class="mb-3">
                    Accessed via: 
                    <a href="https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        <i class="fas fa-external-link-alt me-1"></i>
                        Google YouTube Data API
                    </a>
                </p>
                
                <div class="section-title">
                    <i class="fas fa-quote-left me-2"></i>Citation
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2">To cite this dashboard:</p>
                <div class="citation-text">
                    Zeleke,Y.(2026). Debre Berhan Holy Trinity EOTC Dallas-TX Dashboard [github.io]. 
                    <a href="https://github.com/yihun/eotc-youtube-channels" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">
                        https://github.com/yihun/eotc-youtube-channels
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <div class="section-title mt-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-user-circle me-2"></i>Credits
                </div>
                <p class="mb-0">
                    <strong>Designed by:</strong> Yihun Zeleke, 2026
                </p>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">
                    <i class="fas fa-times me-2"></i>Close
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap/5.3.0/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
```


```{r}
#| context: setup
#| label: load-libraries
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| inlcude: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
library(stringr)
library(showtext)
library(ggtext)
library(tidytext)
source(here::here("scripts/data_cleaning_001.R"))
source(here::here("scripts/theme_and_function.R"))

font_add_google("Libre Franklin", "franklin")
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_family = "Libre Fraklin"))
dark_gregy = "#1e2a45"
```

## Column - Top 10 high engagement rate table {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| html-table-processing: none
like_icon = html(
  '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="15" height="15" fill="#ffffff" stroke="none">
  <path d="M20.84 4.61a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 0L12 5.67l-1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 7.78l1.06 1.06L12 21.23l7.78-7.78 1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0 0-7.78z"/>
</svg>'
)

videos %>%
  filter(views >= 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(engage_rate)) %>%
  select(title, published_at, views, likes, engage_rate) %>%
  mutate(published_at = format(as.Date(published_at), "%m-%d-%Y")) |>
  head(10) |>
  gt::gt(id = "custom") |>
  cols_label(
    title = md("Service Type"),
    published_at = md("**Date**"),
    views = md("**Views**"),
    engage_rate = "% Engagment",
    likes = like_icon
    # thumbnail_url = ""
  ) |>
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(views)
  ) |>
  cols_width(published_at ~ px(150)) |>
  fmt_percent(
    columns = engage_rate,
    decimals = 1
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "red", weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = engage_rate)
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = engage_rate),
    fn = function(x) {
      # x is already formatted as "12.5%" string by fmt_percent
      ifelse(
        as.numeric(gsub("%", "", x)) >= 7.3,
        paste0('<span style="color:#4ade80;">▲ ', x, '</span>'),
        paste0('<span style="color:red;">▼ ', x, '</span>')
      )
    }
  ) |>

  fmt_number(columns = views, sep_mark = ",", decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(published_at ~ px(100)) |>
  tab_header(
    title = html(
      "<strong style='color:grey;'>Top 10 videos:</strong> <span style='color:green;font-style: italic;'>Higher Engagement</span>"
    )
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.color = "#FFFFFF",
    table.background.color = "#1e2a45",
    table.font.size = px(12),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent",
    footnotes.background.color = "#282828",
    source_notes.background.color = "#282828",
    table.border.top.style = "hidden",
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "
  table tr:nth-child(odd) {
    background-color: #253352;
  }
    
  table tr:hover {
    background-color: #2e3f63;
  }
  
  .cell-output-display {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }
  
  div#custom {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }


  #custom thead tr {
    position: sticky !important;
    top: -1px !important;   /* adjust this to match the exact height of your title */
    z-index: 101 !important;
  }

  #custom thead tr th {
    background-color: #1e2a45 !important;
    border-top: none !important;
  }
  #custom table {
    border-collapse: collapse !important;
  }
  "
  )

```

### Row - histogram {height="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| expandable: true
#| fill: true

engage_hst_plot <- videos |>
  ggplot(aes(
    x = engage_rate,
    text = paste(
      'Views:',
      views,
      "\n% Engagement: ",
      scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(engage_rate)
    )
  )) +
  geom_histogram(
    fill = 'orange',
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Engagement Rate Distribution",
    x = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  custom_theme()

# tooltip = c("x", "count", "text")
ggplotly(engage_hst_plot, tooltip = list("text")) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE, responsive = TRUE) |>
  layout(
    autosize = TRUE,
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 10)
    ),
    legend = list(font = list(size = 10)),
    title = "Engagement Rate Distribution"
  )

```

## Column - Low engagement {width="50%"}

## Row - Engagement flag plot {height="100%"}

```{r}
#| expandable: true
engage_sctr_plot <- ggplot(
  videos,
  aes(
    x = views,
    y = engage_rate,
    color = flag,
    text = paste(
      'Views:',
      views,
      '\nClassification:',
      flag,
      "\n% Engagement: ",
      scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(engage_rate)
    )
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "High Views, Low Engagement" = "red",
      "Low Views, High Engagement" = "blue",
      "Top Performer" = "green",
      "Underperformer" = "gray",
      "Normal" = "#8dc08d"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Engagement Flag Map",
    x = "Views (log scale)",
    y = "% Engagement Rate",
    color = "Flag"
  ) +
  custom_theme() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )


ggplotly(engage_sctr_plot, tooltip = 'text') |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(
      tickfont = list(size = 10)
    ),
    legend = list(font = list(size = 12)),
    title = "Engagement flag plot"
  )

```

### Row - High views, low engagements table

```{r}
#| label: videos-monthly-trends
#| html-table-processing: none
videos %>%
  filter(flag == "High Views, Low Engagement") %>%
  arrange(desc(views)) |>
  head(10) |>
  arrange(desc(engage_rate)) %>%
  mutate(published_at = format(published_at, "%m-%d-%Y")) |>
  select(
    title,
    published_at,
    views,
    like_rate,
    comment_rate,
    engage_rate
  ) %>%
  gt(id = "custom") |>
  cols_label(
    title = md("**Service Type**"),
    published_at = md("**Date**"),
    views = md("**Views**"),
    like_rate = md("**%Like Rate**"),
    comment_rate = md("**% Comment Rate**"),
    engage_rate = md("**% Engagement Rate**")
  ) |>
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(views)
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(
    columns = contains('rate'),
    decimals = 1
  ) |>
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = engage_rate),
    fn = function(x) {
      ifelse(
        as.numeric(gsub("%", "", x)) > 1.7,
        paste0('<span style="color:green;">▲ ', x, '</span>'),
        paste0('<span style="color:red;">▼ ', x, '</span>')
      )
    }
  ) |>
  fmt_number(columns = views, sep_mark = ",", decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(published_at ~ px(100)) |>
  tab_header(
    title = html(
      "<strong style='color:grey;'>High Views:</strong> <span style='color:red;  font-style: italic;'>Low Engagement</span>"
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "red", weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = engage_rate)
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.color = "#FFFFFF",
    table.background.color = "#191414",
    table.font.size = px(12),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent",
    footnotes.background.color = "#282828",
    source_notes.background.color = "#282828",
    table.border.top.style = "hidden",
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "
  table tr:nth-child(odd) {
    background-color: #282828;
  }
    
  table tr:hover {
    background-color: #383838;
  }
  
  .cell-output-display {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }
  
  div#custom {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }

  #custom .gt_heading {
    position: sticky !important;
    top: -20px !important;
    z-index: 102 !important;
    background-color: #191414 !important;
  }

  #custom thead tr {
    position: sticky !important;
    top: -1px !important;   /* adjust this to match the exact height of your title */
    z-index: 101 !important;
  }

  #custom thead tr th {
    background-color: #191414 !important;
    border-top: none !important;
  }
  #custom table {
    border-collapse: collapse !important;
  }
  "
  )

```
